---
title: "`r params$title`"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
params:
  title: "RNAdetector Circular RNA Analysis Report"
  pipeline_version: "2.0"
  analysis_type: "circ_rna"
  algorithm: "bwa"
  counting_algorithm: "ciri2"
  de_algorithm: "none"
  genome_name: "Human (hg38)"
  annotation_name: "GENCODE v38"
  threads: 4
  memory_gb: 8
  trim_enabled: true
  trim_quality: 20
  trim_length: 50
  output_dir: "."
  job_name: "circ_rna_analysis"
  input_files: ""
  pathway_analysis: false
  circ_rna_detection: true
  circ_algorithm: "ciri2"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 4
    theme: darkly
    highlight: monokai
    code_folding: show
    self_contained: true
    number_sections: true
bibliography: references.bib
csl: nature.csl
---

```{css custom-dark-theme, echo=TRUE}
/* Custom CSS for dark theme report styling */
body {
  font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
  line-height: 1.7;
}
body p {
  text-align: justify;
}
.table-striped > tbody > tr:nth-of-type(odd) {
  background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
}
pre {
  border: 1px solid #444;
}
```

```{r setup, echo=TRUE}
# Load required libraries for circular RNA analysis reporting
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(knitr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(DT)
})

# Set global chunk options: all code visible
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6,
  fig.align = "center"
)

# Set ggplot2 theme for dark background reports
theme_dark_report <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#222222", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#2d2d2d", color = NA),
    text = element_text(color = "#e0e0e0"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "#cccccc"),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#444444"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "#333333"),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#222222"),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "#e0e0e0"),
    plot.title = element_text(color = "#ffffff", size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "#bbbbbb")
  )
```

# Analysis Overview

```{r analysis-overview, echo=TRUE}
# Display summary of the circular RNA analysis parameters
cat("**Job Name:**", params$job_name, "\n\n")
cat("**Analysis Type:** Circular RNA Detection\n\n")
cat("**Reference Genome:**", params$genome_name, "\n\n")
cat("**Annotation:**", params$annotation_name, "\n\n")
cat("**Detection Algorithm:**", params$circ_algorithm, "\n\n")
cat("**Alignment Algorithm:**", params$algorithm, "\n\n")
cat("**Pipeline Version:**", params$pipeline_version, "\n\n")
```

# Materials and Methods

```{r materials-methods, child='materials_methods.Rmd', echo=TRUE}
# Include the shared Materials and Methods child document.
# This generates publication-ready methods text covering circRNA detection workflow.
```

# Junction Read Statistics

```{r load-ciri-results, echo=TRUE}
# Load CIRI2 or CIRIquant output files from the pipeline
ciri_file <- file.path(params$output_dir, "ciri_output.tsv")
ciri_file_alt <- file.path(params$output_dir, "ciri2_output.tsv")
ciriquant_file <- file.path(params$output_dir, "ciriquant_output.tsv")

circ_data <- NULL
data_source <- "none"

# Try CIRIquant first, then CIRI2
for (candidate in c(ciriquant_file, ciri_file, ciri_file_alt)) {
  if (file.exists(candidate)) {
    circ_data <- read.delim(candidate, header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, comment.char = "#")
    data_source <- ifelse(grepl("ciriquant", candidate), "CIRIquant", "CIRI2")
    cat("Loaded", data_source, "results:", nrow(circ_data), "circular RNAs detected\n")
    break
  }
}

if (is.null(circ_data)) {
  cat("CircRNA detection output files not found in output directory.\n")
  cat("Searched locations:\n")
  cat("-", ciriquant_file, "\n")
  cat("-", ciri_file, "\n")
  cat("-", ciri_file_alt, "\n")
}
```

```{r junction-read-summary, echo=TRUE}
# Summarize back-splice junction (BSJ) read counts
if (!is.null(circ_data)) {
  # Identify the junction read count column
  junc_col <- grep("junction|bsj|BSJ|junc_reads|junction_reads", colnames(circ_data),
                   value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)[1]

  if (!is.na(junc_col)) {
    junc_counts <- as.numeric(circ_data[[junc_col]])

    cat("### Back-Splice Junction (BSJ) Read Summary\n\n")
    cat("**Total circRNAs detected:**", nrow(circ_data), "\n\n")
    cat("**Total BSJ reads:**", sum(junc_counts, na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")
    cat("**Mean BSJ reads per circRNA:**", round(mean(junc_counts, na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n\n")
    cat("**Median BSJ reads per circRNA:**", median(junc_counts, na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")
    cat("**Max BSJ reads for a single circRNA:**", max(junc_counts, na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")
    cat("**CircRNAs with >= 2 BSJ reads:**", sum(junc_counts >= 2, na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")
    cat("**CircRNAs with >= 5 BSJ reads:**", sum(junc_counts >= 5, na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")
    cat("**CircRNAs with >= 10 BSJ reads:**", sum(junc_counts >= 10, na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")
  }
}
```

```{r junction-read-distribution, echo=TRUE, fig.cap="Distribution of back-splice junction (BSJ) read counts across all detected circular RNAs. Most circRNAs are supported by relatively few junction reads."}
# Plot the distribution of BSJ read counts
if (!is.null(circ_data) && exists("junc_col") && !is.na(junc_col)) {
  junc_df <- data.frame(BSJ_Reads = junc_counts)

  ggplot(junc_df, aes(x = BSJ_Reads)) +
    geom_histogram(fill = "#4fc3f7", color = "#333333", bins = 50) +
    scale_x_log10() +
    labs(
      title = "Distribution of Back-Splice Junction Reads",
      subtitle = paste("Total circRNAs:", nrow(circ_data)),
      x = "BSJ Read Count (log10 scale)",
      y = "Number of CircRNAs"
    ) +
    theme_dark_report
}
```

# CircRNA Detection Summary

## Genomic Distribution

```{r genomic-distribution, echo=TRUE, fig.cap="Chromosomal distribution of detected circular RNAs. CircRNAs are distributed across all chromosomes, with frequency generally correlating with chromosome gene density."}
# Plot chromosomal distribution of detected circRNAs
if (!is.null(circ_data)) {
  chr_col <- grep("chr|chrom|chromosome|Chr", colnames(circ_data),
                  value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)[1]

  if (!is.na(chr_col)) {
    chr_counts <- as.data.frame(table(circ_data[[chr_col]]))
    colnames(chr_counts) <- c("Chromosome", "Count")

    # Order chromosomes naturally
    chr_order <- c(paste0("chr", 1:22), "chrX", "chrY", "chrM",
                   as.character(1:22), "X", "Y", "MT")
    chr_counts$Chromosome <- factor(chr_counts$Chromosome,
                                     levels = intersect(chr_order, chr_counts$Chromosome))
    chr_counts <- chr_counts[!is.na(chr_counts$Chromosome), ]

    ggplot(chr_counts, aes(x = Chromosome, y = Count)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#ce93d8", width = 0.7) +
      labs(
        title = "Chromosomal Distribution of Circular RNAs",
        x = "Chromosome",
        y = "Number of CircRNAs"
      ) +
      theme_dark_report +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  }
}
```

## CircRNA Type Classification

```{r circrna-type, echo=TRUE, fig.cap="Classification of detected circular RNAs by genomic origin: exonic, intronic, or intergenic."}
# Classify circRNAs by type if annotation information is available
if (!is.null(circ_data)) {
  type_col <- grep("type|circRNA_type|category|annotation", colnames(circ_data),
                   value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)[1]

  if (!is.na(type_col)) {
    type_counts <- as.data.frame(table(circ_data[[type_col]]))
    colnames(type_counts) <- c("Type", "Count")
    type_counts$Percentage <- round(100 * type_counts$Count / sum(type_counts$Count), 1)

    # Display as table
    kable(type_counts, format = "html",
          caption = "CircRNA Classification by Genomic Origin") |>
      kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                                full_width = FALSE)

    # Pie chart
    ggplot(type_counts, aes(x = "", y = Count, fill = Type)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1) +
      coord_polar("y", start = 0) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("#4fc3f7", "#81c784", "#ffb74d", "#ce93d8", "#ef5350")) +
      labs(
        title = "CircRNA Type Distribution",
        fill = "Type"
      ) +
      theme_dark_report +
      theme(
        axis.text = element_blank(),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank()
      )
  } else {
    cat("CircRNA type classification column not found in the results.\n")
  }
}
```

## CircRNA Size Distribution

```{r circrna-size, echo=TRUE, fig.cap="Size distribution of detected circular RNAs (genomic span in base pairs)."}
# Plot the size distribution of detected circRNAs
if (!is.null(circ_data)) {
  start_col <- grep("start|Start|circRNA_start", colnames(circ_data),
                    value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)[1]
  end_col <- grep("end|End|circRNA_end", colnames(circ_data),
                  value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)[1]

  if (!is.na(start_col) && !is.na(end_col)) {
    circ_sizes <- abs(as.numeric(circ_data[[end_col]]) - as.numeric(circ_data[[start_col]]))
    size_df <- data.frame(Size = circ_sizes)

    cat("**CircRNA size statistics:**\n\n")
    cat("- Mean size:", round(mean(circ_sizes, na.rm = TRUE)), "bp\n")
    cat("- Median size:", median(circ_sizes, na.rm = TRUE), "bp\n")
    cat("- Min size:", min(circ_sizes, na.rm = TRUE), "bp\n")
    cat("- Max size:", max(circ_sizes, na.rm = TRUE), "bp\n\n")

    ggplot(size_df, aes(x = Size)) +
      geom_histogram(fill = "#81c784", color = "#333333", bins = 60) +
      scale_x_log10(labels = scales::comma) +
      labs(
        title = "CircRNA Size Distribution",
        subtitle = "Genomic span from back-splice donor to acceptor",
        x = "CircRNA Size (bp, log10 scale)",
        y = "Number of CircRNAs"
      ) +
      theme_dark_report
  }
}
```

## Top Circular RNAs

```{r top-circrnas, echo=TRUE}
# Display the most abundant circular RNAs ranked by junction read support
if (!is.null(circ_data) && exists("junc_col") && !is.na(junc_col)) {
  # Select relevant columns for display
  display_cols <- c()
  for (pattern in c("circRNA_ID|circ_id|ID", "chr|chrom", "start|Start",
                     "end|End", "strand|Strand", junc_col, "gene|Gene|gene_id")) {
    matched <- grep(pattern, colnames(circ_data), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)[1]
    if (!is.na(matched)) display_cols <- c(display_cols, matched)
  }

  if (length(display_cols) > 0) {
    top_circ <- circ_data[order(-as.numeric(circ_data[[junc_col]])), display_cols, drop = FALSE]
    top_circ <- head(top_circ, 50)

    datatable(
      top_circ,
      caption = "Top 50 Circular RNAs by Back-Splice Junction Read Count",
      options = list(
        pageLength = 20,
        dom = "ftip",
        scrollX = TRUE
      ),
      rownames = FALSE
    )
  }
} else {
  cat("CircRNA results table not available for display.\n")
}
```

## Host Gene Analysis

```{r host-genes, echo=TRUE, fig.cap="Top 20 host genes producing the most circular RNA isoforms."}
# Identify host genes producing multiple circRNA isoforms
if (!is.null(circ_data)) {
  gene_col <- grep("gene|Gene|gene_id|host_gene|gene_name", colnames(circ_data),
                   value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)[1]

  if (!is.na(gene_col)) {
    # Count circRNAs per host gene
    gene_circ_counts <- as.data.frame(table(circ_data[[gene_col]]))
    colnames(gene_circ_counts) <- c("Gene", "CircRNA_Count")
    gene_circ_counts <- gene_circ_counts[order(-gene_circ_counts$CircRNA_Count), ]

    cat("**Total host genes:**", nrow(gene_circ_counts), "\n\n")
    cat("**Genes with multiple circRNA isoforms:**",
        sum(gene_circ_counts$CircRNA_Count > 1), "\n\n")

    # Plot top 20 host genes
    top_genes <- head(gene_circ_counts, 20)

    ggplot(top_genes, aes(x = reorder(Gene, CircRNA_Count), y = CircRNA_Count)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#ffb74d", width = 0.7) +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(
        title = "Top 20 Host Genes by CircRNA Isoform Count",
        x = "Host Gene",
        y = "Number of CircRNA Isoforms"
      ) +
      theme_dark_report
  } else {
    cat("Host gene information not available in the circRNA detection results.\n")
  }
}
```

# Software Versions

```{r software-versions, echo=TRUE}
# Compile a table of all software tools and their versions
software_df <- data.frame(
  Software = c("RNAdetector", "R", "Bioconductor"),
  Version = c(
    params$pipeline_version,
    paste(R.version$major, R.version$minor, sep = "."),
    as.character(BiocManager::version())
  ),
  Reference = c("Alaimo et al., 2020", "R Core Team, 2023", "Huber et al., 2015"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Add circRNA detection tools
if (params$circ_algorithm == "ciriquant") {
  software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(Software = "CIRIquant", Version = "1.1.2", Reference = "Zhang et al., 2020"))
  software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(Software = "CIRI2", Version = "2.0.6", Reference = "Gao et al., 2018"))
} else {
  software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(Software = "CIRI2", Version = "2.0.6", Reference = "Gao et al., 2018"))
}

# Add alignment tools
if (params$algorithm == "bwa") {
  software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(Software = "BWA", Version = "0.7.17", Reference = "Li & Durbin, 2009"))
}
software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(Software = "SAMtools", Version = "1.13", Reference = "Li et al., 2009"))

if (params$trim_enabled) {
  software_df <- rbind(software_df, data.frame(Software = "Trim Galore", Version = "0.6.6", Reference = "Krueger, 2015"))
}

kable(software_df, format = "html", caption = "Software Versions") |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
```

# Session Information

```{r session-info, echo=TRUE}
# Print full R session information for complete reproducibility
sessionInfo()
```

# References
